source_references: Ustawa z dnia 12 maja 2011 r. o refundacji leków (Reimbursement Act of 12 May 2011)
interpretation_text: CENA_HURTOWA_PLN (cena hurtowa) is the regulated wholesale price in PLN under the Polish Reimbursement Act of 2011. It is the price at which wholesalers supply pharmacies, including a statutorily-bounded wholesale margin, but excluding the pharmacy margin and VAT.
caveats: Includes wholesale margin; comparison to manufacturer-side categories from other countries requires a derivation rule (Phase 5).
The list also publishes manufacturer price (cena zbytu netto) and retail price; CENA_HURTOWA_PLN is one of several fields in the same publication.
